ucs.title: [LLM] Metador metaMain/Mafalda loader via cdb.exe Console Debugger LOLBIN
ucs.description: Hunts Metador's signature initial-access-to-execution chain: the abuse of Microsoft's signed Console Debugger (cdb.exe) with a command-file (.cfg/.wds) to decrypt and run embedded shellcode for the metaMain or Mafalda implant. SentinelLabs (Sept 2022) flagged this LOLBIN-based loader as the single most distinctive Metador artefact — cdb.exe is virtually unseen on telco/ISP/university production fleets, which is exactly the verticals Metador targets in MEA.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.process_path) as path values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name="cdb.exe" NOT (Processes.user="*$" OR Processes.user IN ("SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE")) by Processes.dest Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_path Processes.process Processes.user | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | where match(cmdline,"(?i)\s-(cf|cfr|c|pd|pn|pv|lines|logo)\s") OR match(cmdline,"(?i)\.(cfg|wds|tmp|dat|bin)(\"|\s|$)") OR match(path,"(?i)\\(Users\\Public|ProgramData|AppData\\(Local|Roaming)|Windows\\Temp|Temp)\\") | eval mitre_techniques="T1218,T1059.003,T1027.013", actor="Metador (G1013)" | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
// Metador — cdb.exe (Console Debugger) abused as a signed loader for metaMain / Mafalda
let _suspicious_paths = dynamic([@"\Users\Public\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\AppData\Roaming\", @"\Windows\Temp\", @"\PerfLogs\"]);
let _cmdfile_flags = dynamic(["-cf ", "-cfr ", "-c ", "-pd ", "-pn ", "-pv "]);
let _payload_exts   = dynamic([".cfg", ".wds", ".dat", ".bin", ".tmp"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(30d)
| where FileName =~ "cdb.exe" or InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "cdb.exe"
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where AccountName !in~ ("system","local service","network service")
| extend Cmd = tolower(strcat(ProcessCommandLine, " ", InitiatingProcessCommandLine))
| where Cmd has_any (_cmdfile_flags)
     or Cmd has_any (_payload_exts)
     or FolderPath has_any (_suspicious_paths)
     or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (_suspicious_paths)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentPath = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          Child = FileName, ChildPath = FolderPath,
          ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          SHA256, IsRemoteSession = InitiatingProcessTokenElevation
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Metador — cdb.exe Console Debugger LOLBIN loader (Sentinel via 4688 + ASIM fallback)
let _suspicious_paths = dynamic([@"\Users\Public\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\AppData\Roaming\", @"\Windows\Temp\", @"\PerfLogs\"]);
let _cmdfile_flags = dynamic(["-cf ", "-cfr ", "-c ", "-pd ", "-pn ", "-pv "]);
let _payload_exts   = dynamic([".cfg", ".wds", ".dat", ".bin", ".tmp"]);
let _from_secevt =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where (NewProcessName endswith @"\cdb.exe") or (ParentProcessName endswith @"\cdb.exe")
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend Cmd = tolower(coalesce(CommandLine, ""))
    | where Cmd has_any (_cmdfile_flags) or Cmd has_any (_payload_exts)
         or NewProcessName has_any (_suspicious_paths)
         or ParentProcessName has_any (_suspicious_paths)
    | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              Parent = ParentProcessName, Child = NewProcessName,
              ChildCmd = CommandLine, TokenElevationType, Source = "SecurityEvent4688";
let _from_asim =
    ImProcessCreate
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
    | where TargetProcessName endswith @"\cdb.exe" or ParentProcessName endswith @"\cdb.exe"
    | where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
    | extend Cmd = tolower(coalesce(TargetProcessCommandLine, ""))
    | where Cmd has_any (_cmdfile_flags) or Cmd has_any (_payload_exts)
         or TargetProcessName has_any (_suspicious_paths)
         or ParentProcessName has_any (_suspicious_paths)
    | project TimeGenerated, Computer = DvcHostname, Account = ActorUsername,
              Parent = ParentProcessName, Child = TargetProcessName,
              ChildCmd = TargetProcessCommandLine, TokenElevationType = ActingProcessIntegrityLevel,
              Source = "ImProcessCreate";
union isfuzzy=true _from_secevt, _from_asim
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Metador metaMain/Mafalda Loader via cdb.exe Console Debugger
id: 9e6b1c1a-5c4f-4e3a-b9b1-metador-cdb-loader
status: experimental
description: Detects abuse of Microsoft Console Debugger (cdb.exe) with a command-file flag or payload-shaped argument — the signature loader Metador (G1013) uses to decrypt and inject the metaMain and Mafalda implants on telco/ISP/university targets in the Middle East and Africa.
references:
  - https://www.sentinelone.com/labs/the-mystery-of-metador-an-unattributed-threat-hiding-in-telcos-isps-and-universities/
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1013/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026-05-03
tags:
  - attack.execution
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.t1218
  - attack.t1059.003
  - attack.t1027.013
  - g1013
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_image:
    - Image|endswith: '\cdb.exe'
    - ParentImage|endswith: '\cdb.exe'
  selection_args:
    - CommandLine|contains:
        - ' -cf '
        - ' -cfr '
        - ' -pd '
        - ' -pn '
        - ' -pv '
    - CommandLine|contains:
        - '.cfg'
        - '.wds'
        - '.dat'
        - '.bin'
  selection_paths:
    - Image|contains:
        - '\Users\Public\'
        - '\ProgramData\'
        - '\AppData\Local\Temp\'
        - '\AppData\Roaming\'
        - '\Windows\Temp\'
  filter_machine_account:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: selection_image and (selection_args or selection_paths) and not filter_machine_account
falsepositives:
  - Windows SDK / WinDbg developer workflows on engineering laptops — scope detection to production fleets or build an allowlist for the dev OU.
level: high
ucs.rationale: cdb.exe is a Microsoft-signed kernel/user-mode debugger from the Windows SDK Debugging Tools — virtually never present in business-as-usual telco/ISP/university operator workflows, but the SentinelLabs Metador disclosure (Sept 2022) showed this is precisely how the group sideloads metaMain and Mafalda: a .cfg command file fed to cdb.exe with -cf decrypts and jumps to embedded shellcode. The combin
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] Metador Mafalda WMI Event Subscription persistence (filter-to-consumer binding)
ucs.description: Hunts the WMI Event-Filter / CommandLineEventConsumer pair Metador's Mafalda framework writes for stealth persistence on long-lived telco/ISP hosts. Metador (G1013) deliberately favours WMI permanent subscriptions over Run keys or services because they survive reboot, run as SYSTEM, and rarely raise tickets in operator-grade EDR baselines.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("wmic.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mofcomp.exe","wbemtest.exe") NOT (Processes.user="*$") by Processes.dest Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process Processes.user | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | where (match(cmdline,"(?i)__EventFilter") AND match(cmdline,"(?i)(CommandLineEventConsumer|ActiveScriptEventConsumer)")) OR match(cmdline,"(?i)__FilterToConsumerBinding") OR (match(cmdline,"(?i)Set-WmiInstance") AND match(cmdline,"(?i)(__EventFilter|EventConsumer|FilterToConsumerBinding)")) OR (match(cmdline,"(?i)mofcomp") AND match(cmdline,"(?i)\\(Users\\Public|ProgramData|Temp|AppData)\\")) | eval mitre_techniques="T1546.003,T1059.003", actor="Metador (G1013)" | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort -lastTime
ucs.kql:
// Metador / Mafalda — WMI Event Subscription persistence creation
let _wmi_keywords = dynamic([
    "__EventFilter", "CommandLineEventConsumer", "ActiveScriptEventConsumer",
    "__FilterToConsumerBinding", "__IntervalTimerInstruction", "__AbsoluteTimerInstruction",
    "Set-WmiInstance", "New-CimInstance", "root\\subscription"
]);
let _suspicious_paths = dynamic([@"\Users\Public\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\Windows\Temp\", @"\PerfLogs\"]);
let _process_creates =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(30d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName in~ ("wmic.exe", "powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe", "mofcomp.exe", "wbemtest.exe", "wscript.exe", "cscript.exe")
    | extend CmdLower = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
    | where CmdLower has_any (_wmi_keywords)
    | where CmdLower has_any ("create", "set-wmi", "new-cim", "new-wmi", "instance", "path ", ".mof")
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
              Actor = FileName, ActorPath = FolderPath,
              Cmd = ProcessCommandLine,
              Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName, ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              Source = "DeviceProcessEvents";
let _wmi_persistence_events =
    DeviceEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(30d)
    | where ActionType in ("WmiBindEventFilterToConsumer", "PowerShellCommand")
    | extend Extra = tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields))
    | where Extra has_any (_wmi_keywords) or Extra has_any ("FilterToConsumerBinding", "CommandLineEventConsumer")
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName = InitiatingProcessAccountName,
              Actor = InitiatingProcessFileName, ActorPath = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
              Cmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              Parent = InitiatingProcessParentFileName, ParentCmd = "",
              Source = strcat("DeviceEvents:", ActionType);
union _process_creates, _wmi_persistence_events
| extend SuspectPath = iff(ActorPath has_any (_suspicious_paths) or Cmd has_any (_suspicious_paths), "yes", "no")
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Metador / Mafalda — WMI Event Subscription persistence creation (Sentinel)
let _wmi_keywords = dynamic([
    "__EventFilter", "CommandLineEventConsumer", "ActiveScriptEventConsumer",
    "__FilterToConsumerBinding", "Set-WmiInstance", "New-CimInstance", "root\\subscription"
]);
let _wmi_actor_bins = dynamic([@"\wmic.exe", @"\powershell.exe", @"\pwsh.exe", @"\mofcomp.exe", @"\wbemtest.exe", @"\wscript.exe", @"\cscript.exe"]);
let _from_secevt =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where NewProcessName has_any (_wmi_actor_bins)
    | extend CmdLower = tolower(coalesce(CommandLine, ""))
    | where CmdLower has_any (_wmi_keywords)
    | where CmdLower has_any ("create", "set-wmi", "new-cim", "new-wmi", "instance", "path ", ".mof")
    | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              Actor = NewProcessName, Cmd = CommandLine,
              Parent = ParentProcessName, Source = "SecurityEvent4688";
let _from_wmi_channel =
    Event
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
    | where EventLog == "Microsoft-Windows-WMI-Activity/Operational"
    | where EventID in (5860, 5861)             // permanent event consumer registration
    | extend Payload = tostring(EventData)
    | where Payload has_any ("CommandLineEventConsumer", "ActiveScriptEventConsumer", "FilterToConsumerBinding")
    | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account = User,
              Actor = "WMI-Activity", Cmd = Payload,
              Parent = "", Source = strcat("WMI-Activity:", tostring(EventID));
union isfuzzy=true _from_secevt, _from_wmi_channel
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.rationale: Metador's Mafalda framework was observed by SentinelLabs deploying WMI permanent subscriptions for persistence — an unusual choice for a long-dwell espionage actor in MEA telco/ISP environments where Run-key creation would surface in EDR baselines but WMI subscription creation often does not. Pairing process-create telemetry on the canonical WMI registration tools (wmic, mofcomp, PowerShell Set-Wm
